Update fastlane metadata and screenshots for v2.50.0

Sync metadata and screenshots from App Store Connect, update release
notes for v2.50.0 highlighting Astral accuracy improvements and widget
bug fixes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
